svg.text: ① Composed, not custom — insure1 configures the 1 Suite (service1 + finance1) for insurance; built fast on proven products.
② Human decides claims — agents draft, recommend & flag; people decide every claim, payout & denial.
③ Fair & grounded — consistent adjudication tied to actual policy terms; no unfair denials, no hallucinated cover.
④ Fraud: flag, don't deny — suspicious claims surfaced for investigation, never auto-denied.
⑤ Operated to SLA — run1 keeps turnaround, quality & fraud-drift in check; assure1 certifies before go-live.
⑥ Outcome-led — settlement speed, cost, fraud & fairness, measured — delivered via the elan1 method.
